targets.boundary: Company-wide operational emissions (global offices and data centers)
targets.notes: Reduce operational greenhouse gas emissions 75% between 2017 and 2020 and support 100% renewable energy; target has been achieved.
targets.title: 75% reduction in operational GHG emissions by 2020 vs 2017

targets.boundary: Company-wide value chain (global operations and value chain emissions)
targets.notes: Commitment to achieve net-zero greenhouse gas emissions by 2030 across Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions.
targets.title: Net-zero GHG emissions across value chain by 2030
